TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Lohok ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 289 buwan, 791 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 63% kyan ku 499 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 37% kyan ku 292 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 59%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lohok hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Lohok hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lohok hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lohok hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lohok hya' ga Matadim. tay mkyahu' na Lohok hya' ga Mangcelan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Lohok ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ loħok ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na loħok ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na loħok ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na loħok ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na loħok ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na loħok ħjaʔ ɣa mata*im. taj mkjaħuʔ na loħok ħjaʔ ɣa maŋʦ~ʨelan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ loħok ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Lohok ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 289 buwan, 791 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 63% kyan ku 499 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 37% kyan ku 292 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 59%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lohok hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Lohok hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lohok hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lohok hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lohok hya' ga Matadim. tay mkyahu' na Lohok hya' ga Mangcelan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Lohok ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ loħok ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na loħok ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na loħok ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na loħok ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na loħok ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na loħok ħjaʔ ɣa mata*im. taj mkjaħuʔ na loħok ħjaʔ ɣa maŋʦ~ʨelan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ loħok ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
